# Module Card

Save under `docs/domain/modules/MOD-<name>.md`.

## Metadata

- ID: MOD-
- Name:
- Owner (business role):
- Status: draft | review | agreed
- Last reviewed:

## Purpose

One paragraph: why this module exists in business terms.

## Primary Actors

- Actor.

## Headline Capabilities

- Capability 1.
- Capability 2.

## Upstream Dependencies

What this module needs from other modules or external systems.

- Source: input or trigger.

## Downstream Dependencies

What other modules or external systems need from this module.

- Consumer: output.

## Key Domain Concepts

- Concept (link to glossary).

## Linked Requirements

- REQ-XXX, REQ-XXX.

## Notes

- Any constraint, regulation, or assumption specific to this module.

## History

- YYYY-MM-DD: created.
